mapper.select: select frd.id, fi.id as flight_id, fi.flight_number, fi.departure, fi.destination, frd.dish_id, d.name as dish_name, d.status as dish_status, frd.dish_source, (case when ifnull(frd.cabin_type, 3) = 0 then 3 else ifnull(frd.cabin_type, 3) end) as cabin_type, frd.sort from flight_route_dish frd inner join flight_info fi on fi.departure = frd.departure and fi.destination = frd.destination left join dish d on d.id = frd.dish_id where fi.flight_number = #{flightNumber} order by frd.sort asc, frd.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into flight_route_dish (departure, destination, dish_id, dish_source, cabin_type, sort) values (#{departure}, #{destination}, #{dishId}, #{dishSource}, #{cabinType}, #{sort})
mapper.update: update flight_route_dish set departure = #{departure}, destination = #{destination}, dish_id = #{dishId}, dish_source = #{dishSource}, cabin_type = #{cabinType}, sort = #{sort} where id = #{id}
